## Summary

- Describe the change in 1-3 bullets.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Screenshots

If this change affects UI, add screenshots here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused
- [ ] I updated relevant docs
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I verified there are no obvious regressions
